title: perezia glandulosa
intro: Perezia glandulosa, also known as the glandular perezia, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Perezia glandulosa can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
